---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Publications of Sivalingam S M"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

My research publications span **Scientific Machine Learning, neural networks, fractional-order dynamical systems, numerical methods, and control theory**.

The publication list and citation information below are periodically synchronized from my research records.

## Research Profiles

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ezCkT1QAAAAJ&hl=en){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} 

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0818-9007){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sivalingam-S-M){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

---

{{< include publications-auto.qmd >}}
